## 🧪 Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ⚙️ Configuration/infrastructure changes
- [ ] 🧪 Test additions or modifications

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `make format` to format my code
- [ ] I have run `make lint` and addressed all issues
- [ ] My code passes `make test`
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added docstrings to new functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have added comments for complex logic

### Testing

- [ ] I have tested this manually
- [ ] I have added unit tests
- [ ] I have added E2E tests (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass: `make test-all`

### Security

- [ ] I have not introduced any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or credentials
- [ ] I have reviewed the code for potential security issues
